title: Home page loads and shows listing cards
description: Verifies the home page renders its primary content and displays listing results cards.

steps.description: Verify search and filter controls are available

title: Filter listings by category, type, and location hierarchy
description: Verifies users can narrow results using category/type and wilaya/moughataa filters.

steps.description: Verify listing cards update to reflect the selected filters

title: Filter listings by price range
description: Verifies users can apply a price range and see results update accordingly.

steps.description: Fill a valid minimum price into the minimum price field
Fill a valid maximum price into the maximum price field
Verify listing cards update to reflect the selected price range

title: Search by keyword query
description: Verifies users can submit a keyword search and see results refresh.

steps.description: Verify listing results are displayed for the submitted query

title: Paginate through listing results
description: Verifies users can move to another page of results using pagination controls.

steps.description: Click to go to the next page of results
Verify the listing cards refresh to a different set of results

title: Navigate from listing card to listing detail page
description: Verifies users can open a listing detail view from the results list.

steps.description: Click a listing card to open its details
Verify the listing detail view is displayed with key information such as price and description

title: AI-powered query returns no results then broaden to basic criteria and paginate
description: Verifies the no-results state can be recovered by broadening filters and then navigating results pages.

steps.description: Verify an empty state message is visible
Select a broad category filter value
Verify listing cards are displayed after broadening criteria

title: Price range validation when minimum exceeds maximum
description: Verifies the UI prevents or flags an invalid price range configuration.

steps.description: Fill a high valid number into the minimum price field
Fill a lower valid number into the maximum price field
Verify a price validation error is visible

title: Listing details page shows images, description, location, map, and contact section
description: Verifies the listing details page renders its primary content areas for a listing.

steps.description: Click a listing card to open its details
Scroll through the listing details content
Verify listing images are displayed in a carousel
Verify seller contact information section is displayed

title: Share listing from listing details
description: Verifies the share action is available and produces a visible UI outcome without relying on native dialogs.

steps.description: Click a listing card to open its details
Verify a share UI (such as a share panel or share options) is displayed

title: View map location on listing details
description: Verifies the map section renders for a listing with location information.

steps.description: Click a listing card to open its details
Verify a map location view is displayed

title: Login with email and password succeeds and redirects to home
description: Verifies successful email/password login redirects to the home page.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user lands on the home page

title: Login with invalid email/password shows error
description: Verifies invalid credentials produce a visible error state.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Verify a login error message is visible

title: Phone OTP login flow reaches OTP screen and completes with valid code
description: Verifies phone login can proceed to OTP entry and complete authentication using a valid 4-digit code.

steps.description: Switch to the phone login tab
Fill a valid phone number into the phone number field
Wait for the OTP entry page to load
Fill "1234" into the OTP code field
Verify the user lands on the home page

title: Phone OTP login resend flow is available from OTP screen
description: Verifies users can trigger the resend action from the OTP screen without relying on delivery timing.

steps.description: Switch to the phone login tab
Fill a valid phone number into the phone number field
Wait for the OTP entry page to load
Verify a resend confirmation or loading state is visible

title: Register with email successfully redirects to home
description: Verifies a user can complete email registration and is redirected to the home page on success.

steps.description: Fill Test User into the name field
Fill unique_test_user_1@example.com into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Verify the user is redirected to the home page

title: Register with phone redirects to OTP verification page
description: Verifies phone registration leads to the OTP verification screen.

steps.description: Fill Test User into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone number field
Verify the user is redirected to the OTP verification page

title: Registration shows validation errors for missing required fields
description: Verifies client-side/server-side validation is shown when submitting empty registration form.

title: Email registration shows validation error for invalid email format
description: Verifies invalid email format is rejected with a visible validation error.

steps.description: Fill Test User into the name field
Fill invalid-email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Email registration shows validation error for weak/invalid password
description: Verifies password constraints are enforced and errors are shown for an invalid password.

steps.description: Fill Test User into the name field
Fill unique_test_user_2@example.com into the email field
Fill an invalid password into the password field
Verify a password validation error is visible

title: Phone registration shows validation error for invalid phone number
description: Verifies invalid phone numbers are rejected with a visible validation error.

steps.description: Fill Test User into the name field
Fill an invalid phone number into the phone number field
Verify a phone number validation error is visible

title: Switching registration method updates the visible required inputs
description: Verifies switching between email and phone registration changes the form fields shown.

steps.description: Verify the phone number field is displayed
Verify the email field and password field are displayed

title: Register page primary content loads
description: Verifies the registration page loads and presents a method choice to start registration.

steps.description: Verify registration method selection is displayed

title: OTP verification success auto-logs in and redirects to home
description: Verifies entering a valid 4-digit OTP completes verification, logs the user in, and redirects to home.

steps.description: Enter 1234 into the OTP code input
Verify the user is redirected to the home page

title: OTP verification shows error for incorrect code
description: Verifies an incorrect OTP code shows an error state.

steps.description: Enter 0000 into the OTP code input
Verify an OTP error is displayed

title: OTP resend request shows a resend confirmation
description: Verifies the user can request an OTP resend and sees a confirmation state.

steps.description: Request OTP resend if not received
Verify a resend confirmation is visible

title: OTP input enforces 4-digit requirement
description: Verifies the OTP submission is blocked or errors are shown when code length is incomplete.

steps.description: Enter 12 into the OTP code input
Verify a code length validation error is visible

title: OTP page primary content loads
description: Verifies the OTP page loads and shows an input to enter the verification code.

steps.description: Verify an OTP code input is displayed

title: Forgot password page loads and accepts phone input
description: Verifies the forgot password page loads and allows entering a phone number to request an OTP.

steps.description: Fill a valid phone number into the phone number field
Verify a request confirmation or next-step instruction is visible

title: Forgot password shows validation error for invalid phone number
description: Verifies invalid phone numbers cannot be submitted on forgot password.

steps.description: Fill an invalid phone number into the phone number field
Verify a phone number validation error is visible

title: Reset password page shows validation error for mismatched passwords
description: Verifies reset password form enforces matching new password and confirmation.

steps.description: Enter 1234 into the OTP code input
Fill a valid new password into the new password field
Fill a different valid password into the confirm password field
Verify a password mismatch validation error is visible

title: Reset password shows validation error for missing OTP
description: Verifies the reset password form requires an OTP code before submission.

steps.description: Fill a valid new password into the new password field
Fill the same valid password into the confirm password field
Verify an OTP validation error is visible

title: Reset password with wrong OTP shows an error
description: Verifies an invalid OTP on the reset password page shows an error state after submission.

steps.description: Enter 0000 into the OTP code input
Fill a valid new password into the new password field
Fill the same valid password into the confirm password field
Verify an OTP error is displayed

title: Create listing wizard loads and shows step 1 inputs
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the create-listing wizard and see the initial step for entering listing details.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the listing details step is displayed with inputs for category, type, title, description, and price

title: Create listing end-to-end without image upload (submit and land on my listings)
description: Verifies the user can complete steps 1–3 of the wizard and submit a listing, then is redirected to the listings dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill Test Listing Wizard E2E into the title field
Fill Listing created by automated UI test into the description field
Fill a valid price into the price field
Select a valid moughataa if options are available
Verify the user lands on the my listings dashboard

title: Step 1 validation blocks advancing when required fields are empty
description: Verifies that leaving required fields empty prevents proceeding to the next step and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify validation errors are visible for the required fields
Verify the wizard remains on step 1

title: Step navigation preserves entered data when moving forward and back
description: Verifies that data entered in step 1 persists when navigating to step 2 and returning to step 1.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill Persist Title 1001 into the title field
Fill Persist Description 1001 into the description field
Fill a valid price into the price field
Verify the title field value is Persist Title 1001
Verify the description field value is Persist Description 1001

title: Step 2 allows continuing when moughataa options are empty by using map/approximate location
description: Verifies that the user can continue from step 2 even if moughataa options are unavailable by setting an approximate location on the map (or equivalent location input).

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill Location Fallback Listing into the title field
Fill Listing for testing step 2 location fallback into the description field
Fill a valid price into the price field
Set an approximate location using the map or available location selector
Verify the images step is displayed

title: Step 3 enforces maximum of 8 images (UI prevents adding more)
description: Verifies the images step does not allow selecting more than the maximum number of images.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill Image Limit Listing into the title field
Fill Listing for testing image selection limits into the description field
Fill a valid price into the price field
Select a valid moughataa if options are available
Attempt to add more than 8 images using the image picker
Verify no more than 8 selected image previews are shown
Verify an image limit validation or disabled add control is shown

title: Favorites: View favorites, open a listing, and remove it from favorites
description: Verifies a user can view favorites, open a favorite listing details, return, and remove it from the favorites list.

steps.description: Click a favorited listing to view its details
Click the control to return to the favorites list
Verify the removed listing is no longer displayed in the favorites list

title: Favorites: Favorites page loads and shows empty state or items
description: Verifies the favorites page loads successfully and shows either a list of favorites or an empty state.

steps.description: Verify the favorites page shows either favorited listings or an empty state message

title: Favorites: Remove a favorite from the list view
description: Verifies a user can remove a favorited listing directly from the favorites list view.

steps.description: If favorites exist, remove the first listing from favorites
Verify the removed listing no longer appears in the favorites list

title: Favorites: Removed favorite does not reappear after refresh
description: Verifies that after removing a favorite, refreshing the page does not show it again.

steps.description: If favorites exist, remove the first listing from favorites
Verify the removed listing is still not displayed in the favorites list

title: Favorites: Navigate from favorites to a listing details page
description: Verifies a user can open a favorite listing and see listing details content.

steps.description: Click a favorited listing to view its details
Verify listing details content is displayed

title: Favorites: Attempt to remove a favorite and handle UI error state (if presented)
description: Verifies that if the UI surfaces an error during favorite removal, the favorite remains visible.

steps.description: Attempt to remove a listing from favorites
Verify either the listing is removed from the favorites list or an error state is shown and the listing remains visible

title: Logout: Log out from an authenticated page and return to anonymous home state
description: Verifies a user can log out from an authenticated area and is returned to the public home page in an anonymous state.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the public home page
Verify the user is in an anonymous state with no authenticated navigation options visible

title: Logout: After logout, protected pages require login again
description: Verifies that after logging out, navigating to an authenticated page requires logging in again.

steps.description: Verify the user is prompted to authenticate to access the page
